Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TranslatedDependencyContract
    JmlTermFactory.depends(SLExpression lhs, JTerm rhs, SLExpression mby)
    Translates the dependency clause (accessible rhs := mby \measured_by mby) into a dependency contract.
    TranslatedDependencyContract
    JmlIO.translateDependencyContract(LabeledParserRuleContext ctx)
    Translates a dependency contract.
    TranslatedDependencyContract
    JmlIO.translateDependencyContract(ParserRuleContext ctx)
    Translates the given context into a dependency contract, aka, accessible-clause or depends-clause.
